product_highlights: Carbopol® carbomers — the world's most widely used rheology modifier in skincare and hair care
Noveon® polycarbophil — specialty grade for high-performance mucoadhesive and pharmaceutical applications
Styleze™ film formers — long-wear, barrier, and shine performance for styling and color cosmetics
Sensory polymers enabling precise texture tuning from lightweight water-serums to rich creams
Comprehensive global technical support and formulation development expertise
notes: Lubrizol's personal care division is the world's leading supplier of Carbopol® carbomer polymers, which are the global industry standard for rheology modification across skincare, hair care, pharmaceutical topicals, and personal lubricants. Their Styleze™ film former range addresses long-wear, barrier, and shine requirements in styling products and color cosmetics. Lubrizol's sensory polymer portfolio provides formulators with the tools to precisely tune texture profiles from ultra-light water serums to opulent rich creams. EFfCI GMP certified production and extensive global formulation support make Lubrizol an essential partner for brands seeking the highest standards of quality and technical expertise in texture modification.
